narrative.description: Sonic Team's Dreamcast sequel alternates hero and dark campaigns with treasure hunting, shooting, and speed stages.
narrative.core_loop: Play hero and dark stories, collect emeralds across speed, treasure, and shooting stages, and confront Final Hazard.

mechanics.map_notes: Core mission select structure defines Sonic Adventure 2 stage design.
mechanics.expression: Core mission select structure defines Sonic Adventure 2 stage design.

mechanics.map_notes: Sonic Adventure 2 uses character swap abilities for world structure.
mechanics.expression: Sonic Adventure 2 uses character swap abilities for world structure.

mechanics.map_notes: momentum based speed drives progression in Sonic Adventure 2.
mechanics.expression: momentum based speed drives progression in Sonic Adventure 2.

mechanics.map_notes: Hazards and obstacles test traversal mastery in Sonic Adventure 2.
mechanics.expression: Hazards and obstacles test traversal mastery in Sonic Adventure 2.

mechanics.map_notes: Checkpoints and stage boundaries save progress between attempts.
mechanics.expression: Checkpoints and stage boundaries save progress between attempts.

mechanics.map_notes: Lives or health gates retries on failure.
mechanics.expression: Lives or health gates retries on failure.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss encounters follow learnable attack cycles.
mechanics.expression: Boss encounters follow learnable attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Platform sections demand accurate jump timing.
mechanics.expression: Platform sections demand accurate jump timing.

mechanics.map_notes: Health depletes on hazard and enemy contact.
mechanics.expression: Health depletes on hazard and enemy contact.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss victories and key objectives unlock subsequent content. (Sonic Adventure 2)

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Sonic Adventure 2 through its core platformer loop.
